ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "manner_of_death" TEXT /* Manner of death or injury (e.g., shot, tasered) */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Type of weapon involved (e.g., gun, knife, none) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "signs_of_mental_illness" INTEGER /* Whether signs of mental illness were present */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Threat level of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "flee" TEXT /* Whether the individual was fleeing */,
  "body_camera" INTEGER /* Whether body camera footage is available */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency handling the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., shooting, arrest) */,
  "use_of_force" INTEGER /* Whether use of force was involved */,
  "injury" INTEGER /* Whether any injuries occurred */,
  "fatal" INTEGER /* Whether the incident was fatal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the officer belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Training level of the officer */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date of certification */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer's supervisor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Total training hours of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_officer_roles" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the incident (e.g., primary officer, secondary officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the agency belongs to */,
  "chief" TEXT /* Chief of the agency */,
  "chief_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency's chief */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agencies_chief_id FOREIGN KEY ("chief_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_camera_footage" (
  "footage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footage */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the footage belongs to */,
  "footage_date" TEXT /* Date the footage was recorded */,
  "footage_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the footage */,
  "footage_file" TEXT /* File containing the footage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the footage in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_camera_footage_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, supervisor, administrator) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer the user belongs to */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view incident, edit report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_versions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
